Headline: Analysts Review Arm Holdings (ARM) Revenue Projections
Summary: Analysts at UBS and Wells Fargo have revised down their price targets for Arm Holdings (ARM) while reaffirming Buy ratings. UBS lowered its target from $195 to $175, suggesting a 66% upside, an estimate consistent with the median Wall Street analyst. Wells Fargo reduced its target from $195 to $160, indicating a 51.86% upside, and expressed optimism about ARM's long-term AI prospects despite lowering 2027 and 2028 revenue projections due to overly optimistic royalty estimates.
